Active Infrastructure Governance
The Governance Operating System for Critical Public Services
NEXUS
Active Infrastructure Governance

Nexus AIG Overview

Your Governance Operating System for Critical Public Services

Risk Register
A comprehensive, AI-assisted register that captures, classifies and scores risks across all governance domains — from Strategic & Commercial to Cybersecurity & Compliance.
Business Review & Action Planning
Action planning and strategic review of tasks, progress and escalations — bridging governance intent with operational delivery in real time.
Dashboard Summaries & Pre/Post Mitigation
Powerful visualisations and AI-generated summaries giving leaders an instant, evidence-based read on governance health across all risk domains.
People & Accountability
See who's contributing to the operational and strategic excellence of your governance framework — from board members to front-line operators.

    MITIGATION STATUS (right side)

    ✓ = Implemented
